files_deferred: Full nested HP search / HGB challengers for candidate-value heads
Pairwise ranker training path (absolute utility ranking shipped first)
Venue/account-specific fee schedules and live broker adapters
behavior_preserved: Fill provenance: no simulated broker_actual; advisory/hypothetical unfilled; midpoint diagnostics never filled.
Fill fraction 0=mid, 1=natural; penalties only worsen concession.
expected/conservative fill prices never better than mid/expected (credit convention).
Ranking does not mutate candidate universes.
intentional_changes: Economics contracts use Decimal at the boundary.
CandidateValueForecast is the Phase-8 value contract; Phase-0 CandidateForecast stub retained for V3DecisionView.
Fill probability / concession models are baseline logistic/Huber ports.
Ranking uses absolute utility + deterministic tie-break; pairwise model deferred.
known_gaps: Pairwise ranker fit path not yet exposed.
Candidate-value quantiles are training-distribution shifted, not per-row HGB heads.
rollback: Revert the Phase 8 commit(s). Phases 0-7 are unaffected.
No new third-party dependencies were added in Phase 8.
